name: @spec-alchemy/ddd-spec
description: Zero-config DDD modeling CLI with validation, build generation, and a packaged viewer.
author: Spec Alchemy

scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test ../ddd-spec-core/*.test.ts ./viewer-dev-session.test.ts ./cli-config.test.ts ./cli-init.test.ts ./cli-packaging.test.ts ./cli-installed-smoke.test.ts ./cli-link.test.ts ./cli-runtime.test.ts ../ddd-spec-projection-viewer/index.test.ts && TSX_TSCONFIG_PATH=../../apps/ddd-spec-viewer/tsconfig.json node --import tsx --test ../../apps/ddd-spec-viewer/test/*.test.ts ../../apps/ddd-spec-viewer/test/*.test.tsx
